menu.sd: Install from SD card or USB storage
menu.net: Install titles over LAN or internet

net.title: Network connection not available
net.desc: Check that airplane mode is disabled and you're connected to a local network.

error.title: No USB connection detected
error.desc: Plug in to a compatible device to install over USB

applet.title: Applet Mode not supported
applet.desc:
You may experience issues using Leaf Installer in Applet Mode. If you do
have problems, please switch to running Leaf Installer over an installed
title (hold R while starting a game)!

help.title: Help
help.desc:
Files can be installed remotely from your other devices using tools such
as NS-USBloader in Tinfoil mode. To send files to your Switch, open one
of these pieces of software on your PC or mobile device, input your
Switch's IP address (listed on-screen), select your files, then upload
to your console! If the software you're using won't let you select
specific file types, try renaming the extension to something it accepts.
Leaf Installer doesn't care about file extensions during net installations!

If you can't figure it out, just copy your files to your SD card and try
the "Install from SD Card" option on the main menu!

src.title: Where do you want to install from?

url.hint: Enter the Internet address of a file

gdrive.hint: Enter the file ID of a public Google Drive file

net.top_info: Select what files you want to install from the server, then press the Plus button!
net.transfer_interput: An error occured during data transfer. Check your network connection.
net.buttons1:  Select File     Select All     Install File(s)     Cancel

help.title: Help
help.desc:
Copy your NSP, NSZ, XCI, or XCZ files to your SD card, browse to and
select the ones you want to install, then press the Plus button.

sd.top_info: Select what files you want to install, then press the Plus button!
sd.delete_info: Installed! Delete the original from the SD card?
sd.delete_info_multi: files installed successfully! Delete them from the SD card?
sd.delete_desc: The original files aren't needed anymore after they've been installed
sd.buttons:  Select File     Select All     Install File(s)     Help     Cancel

help.title: Help
help.desc:
Files can be installed over USB from other devices using tools such as
NS-USBloader in Tinfoil mode. To send files to your Switch, open one of
these pieces of software on your PC, select your files, then upload to
your console!

Unfortunately USB installations require a specific setup on some
platforms, and can be rather buggy at times. If you can't figure it out,
give LAN/internet installs a try, or copy your files to your SD card and
try the "Install from SD Card" option on the main menu!

usb.top_info: USB connection successful! Waiting for list of files to be sent...
usb.top_info2: Select what files you want to install over USB, then press the Plus button!
usb.error: USB transfer timed out or failed
usb.buttons2:  Select File     Select All     Install File(s)     Cancel

info_page.failed_desc: Partially installed contents can be removed from the System Settings applet.

nca_verify.title: Invalid NCA signature detected!
nca_verify.desc:
Improperly signed software should only be installed from trustworthy
sources. Files containing cartridge repacks and DLC unlockers will always
show this warning. You can disable this check in Leaf Installer's settings.

Are you sure you want to continue the installation?
nca_verify.error: The requested NCA is not properly signed:

cfw.confirm_desc:
The configured GitHub repositories will be checked for the latest
release of each component. After the check completes you can pick
which ones to install — selected components are staged under
sdmc:/leaf-offline-update/ and applied on the next reboot by the
Leaf Updater payload via hekate.
cfw.fetch_failed: Could not fetch the latest release information
cfw.fetch_failed_desc: Check the URLs in Settings or your internet connection.
cfw.complete_desc:
The selected components have been written to sdmc:/leaf-offline-update/.
Reboot to hekate and run the Leaf Updater payload to apply them.
cfw.generic_error: Failed to stage custom firmware components!
cfw.select_top_info: Select which components to install, then press the Plus button!
cfw.select_buttons:  Select Component     Select All     Install Selected     Cancel
cfw.no_selection_desc: Select at least one component before continuing.
cfw.missing_payload_desc:
sdmc:/bootloader/payloads/leaf-updater.bin was not found.
Reinstall Leaf from the official release zip — it bundles the updater
payload that applies custom firmware components on next boot.
cfw.arm_failed:
Hekate's [Leaf Update] entry could not be armed automatically.
Reboot to hekate and launch the Leaf Updater payload from the
Payloads menu to finish applying the staged components.

menu_items.ignore_firm: Ignore minimum firmware version required by titles
menu_items.boost_mode: Faster installs by boosting CPU and memory clocks
menu_items.ask_delete: Ask to delete original files after installation
menu_items.auto_update: Check for updates to Leaf Installer automatically
menu_items.check_update: Check for updates to Leaf Installer

nca_warn.title: Warning!
nca_warn.desc:
Some installable files may contain malicious contents! Only disable this
feature if you are absolutely certain the software you will be installing
is trustworthy!

Do you still want to disable NCA signature verification?

update.title: Update available
update.desc1: is available now! Ready to update?
update.end_desc: The software will now be closed.
update.desc_check_fail: You are on the latest version of Leaf Installer!

credits.title: Thanks to the following people!
credits.desc:
- Plutonium (https://github.com/XorTroll/Plutonium) graphics library
- Original Awoo Installer (https://github.com/Huntereb/Awoo-Installer)
- Fork of Awoo Installer (https://github.com/harmonsir/Awoo-Installer) with HTTP and USB hard drive support
- hekate (https://github.com/CTCaer/hekate) bootloader and BDK used by the Leaf Updater payload
- Claude (https://claude.ai/) for the incredible speed on iterating over features

language.title: Select Leaf Installer's language
language.desc: The software will be closed after changing languages. Press B to cancel.

options.title: Change Leaf Installer's settings!
options.leaf_hint: Enter the GitHub releases URL for Leaf Installer
options.amiibo_api_hint: Enter the Amiibo API JSON endpoint URL

amiibo.confirm_desc:
The Amiibo database will be downloaded and all Amiibo data
(including images) will be generated under sdmc:/emuiibo/.
Existing Amiibo folders are skipped.
amiibo.db_failed: Could not download the Amiibo database
amiibo.db_failed_desc: Check your internet connection and the URL.
